overview.title: Auto-Grow Plant Moisture Monitor & Watering System
overview.description: An automated soil-sensing irrigation and environment dashboard.

requirements: Monitor real-time soil moisture and environmental temperature.
Turn on a 5V relay to activate an irrigation water pump when moisture drops below 30%.
Display current soil and environmental readings on a sharp 0.96 inch OLED screen.
Log all data points and warnings over a WiFi-connected database endpoint.
requirements.power_needs: 5V USB Wall Supply, powering MCU, Relay, and OLED screen.
safety_notes: Keep relay AC connection/switching terminals isolated from water lines.
Operate pump with separate power grounds if electrical noise interferes with readings.

components.name: ESP32 NodeMCU Development Board
components.rationale: Provides dual core processor, WiFi connectivity, and plenty of GPIOs for sensor and relay control.

components.name: DHT22 Temperature & Humidity Sensor
components.rationale: Collects environmental temperature and relative humidity to guard against heat-stress.

components.name: 5V 1-Channel Optocoupled Relay Module
components.rationale: Safely switches power to the 5V water pump actuator using low-voltage ESP32 GPIO pins.

pins.name: Signal Input
pins.description: 3.3V-compatible logic input to trigger optocoupled relay module

pins.name: Switch Normally Open Terminal
pins.description: Connected to COM only when energized

components.name: 0.96 inch OLED Display (I2C)
components.rationale: Displays quick status updates, soil moisture %, and humidity readouts locally.

components.name: 5V USB Wall Power Supply
components.rationale: Provides the regulated 5V rail feeding ESP32 VIN and the relay coil supply.

assembly.title: Prepare Components & Power rails
assembly.description: Place the ESP32 board onto a half-sized breadboard. Connect PWR1 5V to ESP32 VIN and the relay VCC rail, then tie PWR1 GND to the shared ground rail. Connect ESP32 3V3 to the low-voltage sensor/display rail.

assembly.title: Assemble & Power the DHT22 Temperature Sensor
assembly.description: Connect DHT22 Pin 1 (VCC) to the 3.3V breadboard rail. Connect Pin 4 (GND) to the GND rail. Connect DHT22 Pin 2 (DATA) directly to the ESP32 pin D27. Place a 10k resistor between VCC and DATA to act as an external pull-up if necessary.

assembly.title: Wire up the SSD1306 OLED Display over I2C
assembly.description: Mount the OLED screen. Run VCC to 3.3V, GND to GND, SDA to ESP32 Pin D21, and SCL to ESP32 Pin D22. This sets up the serial hardware bus.

assembly.title: Install and Wire the 5V Relay Module
assembly.description: Connect Relay VCC to the PWR1 5V rail and GND to system ground. Connect the 3.3V-compatible signal input (IN) of the relay to ESP32 Pin D25.
assembly.danger_message: Never connect AC mains electricity to the relay terminals without proper enclosure insulated blocks!

mechanical.mounting_guidance: Use M3 brass standoffs inside a pre-measured PLA project box. Drill rubber routing holes for moisture probes and power.
fabrication_details: Ventilation grills on the side of the housing to keep the DHT22 breathing correctly.

cad_sources.name: Hammond 1554BGY watertight enclosure CAD
cad_sources.license: Vendor CAD reference for Hammond 1554BGY; verify distributor terms
cad_sources.notes: Use as an off-the-shelf sealed enclosure baseline; drill only low-side cable glands for probes and power.

cad_sources.name: ESP32 Project Enclosure with OLED SSD1306
cad_sources.license: Creative Commons attribution-sharealike listing mirror; verify original Printables license
cad_sources.notes: Reference display bezel and ESP32 standoff placement if a fully printed enclosure is preferred.

component_placements.label: ESP32 NodeMCU Development Board
component_placements.notes: Controller centered on internal standoffs for short signal runs.

component_placements.label: DHT22 Temperature & Humidity Sensor
component_placements.notes: Sensor is placed near the vent opening for airflow.

component_placements.label: 0.96 inch OLED Display (I2C)
component_placements.notes: Display is aligned to the front face for status visibility.

component_placements.label: 5V 1-Channel Optocoupled Relay Module
component_placements.notes: Relay is separated from the sensor side and routed to pump/valve wiring.

spatial_relationships.notes: OLED is front-mounted while the ESP32 remains on the internal plate.
Sensor sits closer to external airflow than the controller.
Relay is kept laterally separated from low-current sensing.
